mapper.select: SELECT oi.id, oi.order_id, oi.menu_id, m.name AS menu_name, oi.qty, oi.unit_price, oi.subtotal FROM order_items oi JOIN menus m ON oi.menu_id = m.id ORDER BY oi.order_id, oi.id
SELECT oi.id, oi.order_id, oi.menu_id, m.name AS menu_name, oi.qty, oi.unit_price, oi.subtotal FROM order_items oi JOIN menus m ON oi.menu_id = m.id WHERE oi.order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY oi.id
